gate.name: handoff-validate
gate.mechanism: 3-tier fail-closed validator — fires when wrapped via compose-handoff-wrap.sh; skipping the wrap skips it
gate.teaches: no room finishes silently — typed handoff, 5 required fields

envelopes.gateline: the packet typed handoff passes, seal unread — emitted, not attested.

gate.name: compose-verify-run
gate.mechanism: warn-first exit code — verdict-bearing when invoked, nothing forces invocation
gate.teaches: a result without a valid_run verdict is role-play, not a run

envelopes.gateline: the packet attested build passes, seal unread — emitted, not attested.
the packet grounded findings passes, seal unread — emitted, not attested.

gate.name: adversarial-review-gate
gate.mechanism: PreToolUse:Write blocks */COMPLETED without structurally-valid adversarial-*.json (fail-open on infra error)
gate.help: run the adversarial review; the artefact unlocks the marker
gate.teaches: touch artefact.json does not satisfy structural validation

envelopes.gateline: LEGBA bars the door — quality 25% does not clear the bar.

gate.name: zone-write-guard
gate.mechanism: PreToolUse:Write/Edit zone boundary deny — zone-write-guard.sh (sprint alias: path-domain-check)
gate.help: write inside your zone; framework zone is submodule-owned

envelopes.gateline: the packet distilled brief passes, seal unread — emitted, not attested.
